title: CellixJS Domain Driven Design Decision
citation: CellixJS Docs. Use DDD Framework to build the data-access project. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Vendor/project architecture context for DDD terminology, domain layer, application service layer, infrastructure layer, aggregates, repositories, and unit-of-work patterns.
claims_supported: CellixJS documentation describes a DDD architecture with domain, application service, and infrastructure service layers.
CellixJS documentation describes contexts, entities, value objects, aggregate roots, unit of work, and repositories.
claims_not_supported: That CellixJS is suitable for OpenClinXR without a spike.
That CellixJS provides the exact actor-cell runtime described in earlier OpenClinXR artifacts.
